title: JWT secret keys should not be disclosed
description: Avoid hardcoding or exposing JWT secret keys in your code.
message: Hardcoded or exposed JWT secret keys detected.
recommendation: Use environment variables or secure secret management services to store JWT secret keys.

noncompliant.code:
import jwt
secret_key = 'my_secret_key'
signed_jwt = jwt.encode({'key':'value'}, secret_key, algorithm='HS256')

compliant.code:
import os
secret_key = os.environ['JWT_SECRET']
signed_jwt = jwt.encode({'key':'value'}, secret_key, algorithm='HS256')

why_is_this_an_issue: Exposing secret keys leaves your application vulnerable to unauthorized access.
how_to_fix: Store secret keys safely and avoid hardcoding them in your code.

metadata.title: JWT secret keys should not be disclosed
